title: Senior Teacher - Arihant Publications - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Arihant Publications - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Arihant Publications invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Teacher at our Kanpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Arihant Publications:
Arihant Publications is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Arihant Publications!
